scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every practical GET list/detail resource is a stream and every dialect-expressible mutation (json/none body, no multipart upload) is a writes.json action; the endpoints that require a multipart file upload are excluded as binary_payload.

excluded.reason: detail-by-token view of a record already fully emitted by the documents list stream; no additional field the list endpoint omits per ZapSign's documented response shape
create-document-via-upload requires a multipart/form-data file body (the source PDF/DOCX); the dialect's write actions support json/form/none bodies only, no multipart

OneClick document creation is a variant of create-document-via-upload gated on a pre-approved template; still requires the same multipart file body as POST /docs/, excluded for the identical binary_payload reason
returns a signed-document PDF binary/redirect, not a JSON record the schema-projection dialect can model
detail-by-token view of a record already fully emitted by the signers list stream
detail-by-id view of a record already fully emitted by the templates list stream
create-template-from-DOCX requires a multipart/form-data file body (the source DOCX); no dialect-expressible JSON/form/none equivalent
update-template accepts the same multipart DOCX-replacement body as template creation
reseller/partner-tier account-provisioning endpoint, gated behind a separate ZapSign Partners API credential this bundle's spec.json does not model
reseller/partner-tier billing endpoint, gated behind the same separate Partners API credential
